reviews.review_description: I was enjoying a great just chatting in different environments which is a great start, now hopefully we can move around which will come next hopefully.

reviews.review_title: Good game keep up good work
reviews.review_description:
The game is good running with my iPhone 8 Plus from the App Store and using a be head set without a controller
So I hope that when I get a oculus go on my birthday it will be even better.

developer_response.body: Hello supinelincoln! Happy to hear that you're enjoying vTime XR. The Oculus Go is a great headset and we're sure that you'll enjoy the app even more when using it. Have a great birthday! If you have any suggestions that you'd like to share with us, you can email us at feedback@vtime.net.

reviews.review_title: I don't know why i got prermlimy banded
reviews.review_description:
Call me at 7402021452
So I can tell you guys

developer_response.body: Hi! If you think your account has been suspended in error or that the reasons are unfair, email us at suspension@vtime.net and we can investigate for you.

reviews.review_description: Its ok so far.

reviews.review_title: I agree this vtime is cool
reviews.review_description: But I rather use my WiFi and not my blue tooth nor data to data

This is the best application I've seen to increase social skills and meet amazing people from across the globe,. I've enjoyed liaising with many different people from around the world in this application. I've made many friends from this application and look forward to what the future implementations may bring. Definitely recommend, trust me!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks, Harry! We really appreciate your feedback and all the effort that you put into the network. :-)

reviews.review_description: Looks really good and have a great avatar builder. The meeting rooms are really amazing. The technology is very interesting. I will not have much use for the app because I have no need to talk with people.

developer_response.body: Thanks for a great review! If you have any suggestions for the app that would mean you would have use for it, email feedback@vtime.net and let us know!

reviews.review_description: The reason to have an oculus go for now. But with this 10/1/update it is dead in the water... Can I sign on and get past the 1st screen. Absolutely dead.  Hoping someone is listening

developer_response.body: Hello! Sorry to hear that you're having issues. We'll be publishing an update tomorrow that will fix this issue. Reinstalling the app will solve the problem if you can't wait for the update. Apologies for the inconvenience.

reviews.review_description: Nothing to do other than chat, basically it's like an Xbox party chat with a different scenery. I'd rather play a game or stream music or do SOMETHING with others to interact. Altspace is so much better as plenty of things to do while you mingle

The destinations are great and meeting new people is great however please incorporate simple parlor games like trivia or tic tac toe or Simon says this will encourage more conversation and people will stay inside longer and I think you can monetize this with artful product placement e.g. a can of Sprite or a MacBook or a box of cereal lying somewhere. Or a floating blimp.

developer_response.body: Happy to hear that you're enjoying our destinations, and great suggestions! Thanks for sharing. I'll pass all of your suggestions on to the team.

reviews.review_description: I we wished to add more seats so we can invite more friends. And more interactions with the surroundings and games for us to play. But overall, the experience was very satisfying. Well recommended app!

developer_response.body: Glad that you're enjoying vTime! I'll share your feedback with the team. If you have any other suggestions, email us on feedback@vtime.net.

reviews.review_description: It's a great app to immers your self in and have conversations. Would be great if you could share YouTube videos with friends!

developer_response.body: Hey Somewhatdamaged! Really happy to hear that you're enjoying the app. Great suggestion. Video is something that we're actively working on at the moment so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I wish the developers could add where you can watch movies together And play different games. This app still gets two thumbs up five stars! Keep up the good work guys.

developer_response.body: Hello sueme5! Thanks for a great review. We're really glad you like the app. If you have any other ideas, you can always email us on feedback@vtime.net and let us know :-)

reviews.review_description: I hate it
i really liked it but can you add that you can watch movies with your friends not only pictures and do a special map for that like cinema or something

developer_response.body: Glad to hear that you're enjoying vTime! Thanks for your suggestion. Video is very much on our radar so stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: You need headphones with a microphone
reviews.review_description: It seems alittle strange to me that you HAVE TO use headphones with a mic. I mean...doesnt our phones have a built in mic and speaker?...it IS a phone after all. Other than that, the concept of it seems pretty neat. And creating the avatar is kind of fun.
I have been trying and trying to set up the app and it just freezes at the screen of the library room with the cat in the window and the fireplace

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that you're having trouble entering the app. Are you using a Go? If so, your issue could be caused by using the wrong button to select. On the Go, we press the swipe pad to select. The trigger is used for pointing. If this doesn't solve your issue, email feedback@vtime.net so that we can get more details and work out what's happening.

reviews.review_description: Still working on it also learning

developer_response.body: Welcome to vTime! Let us know if you have any suggestions by emailing feedback@vtime.net

reviews.review_description: Where are all the rooms that are on the preview?   There's only a few places to go and not the ones like the campfire or underwater

developer_response.body: Hello! The destinations change frequently, and all of the locations featured in the video will cycle in and out of vTime. Email feedback@vtime.net if you have any more questions.

reviews.review_description: The coolest and simplest vr social media platform out there. The developers have done a brilliant job! I would really like to know of there is any way i can run this on the quest.? I have been trying all that i can to get this running on the quest. If there is an alternative. I bought a daydream just for vtime.

developer_response.body: Hello, satheravi! So happy to hear that you're loving the app. We're hoping to come to Quest soon, but don't have a launch date to share just yet. We'll let the community know as soon as we do.
